items.title: Producer claims PASS, observer sees enacted
items.note: Both signals agree the work is complete.

items.title: Producer claims FAIL, observer sees superseded
items.note: Both signals agree the work did not land in its original form.

items.title: Producer claims PASS, observer sees open
items.note: Mismatch: producer asserts done, lifecycle has not transitioned.

items.title: Producer claims FAIL, observer sees enacted
items.note: Mismatch: producer asserts failure, lifecycle records enactment.

items.title: Observer-only entry, no producer claim
items.note: No producer_status filed — nothing to validate consistency against.
